name: Wax Memory
description: Wax-backed memory plugin scaffold for OpenClaw using the verified Wax MCP adapter surface and managed Markdown projections.

endpoint.description: HTTP MCP endpoint for the Wax broker.

command.description: Command used when OpenClaw launches the Wax MCP process directly.

args.description: Arguments passed to the Wax MCP command when OpenClaw launches it directly.

args.label: Wax MCP Arguments
args.help: Used only when OpenClaw launches the Wax MCP process directly.
